propositions: The README documented the session-log command as a bare `rebar session-log "<entry>"` without the required subcommand, which the CLI rejects with `unknown session-log action`.
The valid forms require a subcommand: `rebar session-log append "<entry>"` or `rebar session-log start`.
The invalid bare form contradicted docs/user-guide.md, which already showed the correct subcommand forms.
This ticket corrected the README line to use the valid append form, and a sibling change moved the command catalog into the generated docs/cli-reference.md.
No doc should contain the invalid bare `session-log "<entry>"` form; the valid usage lives in docs/cli-reference.md and docs/user-guide.md.
README's CLI section links to docs/cli-reference.md so the command reference cannot drift.
